testcase.name: test_production_preset[python]

testcase.failure:
contract_template = 'python' working_dir = PosixPath('/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/tmpmq4qoksj/template')
@pytest.mark.parametrize("contract_template", contract_templates) def test_production_preset(contract_template: str, working_dir: Path) -> None: response = run_init( working_dir, f"p-{short_contract_templates[contract_template]}", answers=get_answered_questions_from_copier_yaml( preset_name="production", deployment_language="python", contract_template=contract_template, ), child_template_default_answer="y", )
> assert response.returncode == 0, response.stdout E AssertionError: DEBUG: Running ['/usr/bin/git', '-C', '/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/tmpmq4qoksj/template', 'rev-parse', '--is-shallow-repository'] E DEBUG: Running ['/usr/bin/git', 'clone', '--no-checkout', '/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/tmpmq4qoksj/template', '/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/copier._vcs.clone.0pdwuvj0', '--filter=blob:none'] E DEBUG: Chdir to /var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/copier._vcs.clone.0pdwuvj0 E DEBUG: Running ['/usr/bin/git', '-c', 'core.fsmonitor=false', 'checkout', '-f', 'prep/beta-release'] E DEBUG: Running ['/usr/bin/git', 'submodule', 'update', '--checkout', '--init', '--recursive', '--force'] E DEBUG: Chdir to /private/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/tmpmq4qoksj/template/examples E DEBUG: Chdir to /private/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/copier._vcs.clone.0pdwuvj0 E DEBUG: Running ['/usr/bin/git', 'describe', '--tags', '--always'] E DEBUG: Chdir to /private/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/tmpmq4qoksj/template/examples E DEBUG: final clone URL = /var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/tmpmq4qoksj/template E DEBUG: Chdir to /private/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/tmpmq4qoksj/template/examples/p-py E ==== 1/4 - Initializing base template ==== E DEBUG: Chdir to /private/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/tmpmq4qoksj/template/examples E DEBUG: Chdir to /private/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/tmpmq4qoksj/template/examples/p-py E WARNING: Failed to get user info from git, please input your 'name' manually or use default placeholder. testcase.failure:
contract_template = 'python' working_dir = PosixPath('/var/folders/96/k83m8nkj3ts72l4jw7378sm80000gn/T/tmpmq4qoksj/template')
@pytest.mark.parametrize("contract_template", contract_templates) def test_starter_preset(contract_template: str, working_dir: Path) -> None: response = run_init( working_dir, f"s-{short_contract_templates[contract_template]}", answers=get_answered_questions_from_copier_yaml( preset_name="starter", deployment_language="typescript", contract_template=contract_template, ), child_template_default_answer="n", )
